ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apps" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the mobile app */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the app category */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the app */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the app has received */,
  "installs" TEXT /* Estimated number of app installs */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of app (Free or Paid) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the app */,
  "content_rating" TEXT /* Content rating of the app */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the app */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the app was last updated */,
  "current_version" TEXT /* Current version of the app */,
  "android_version" TEXT /* Minimum Android version required */,
  "reviews_numeric" INTEGER /* Numeric value of reviews for analytical purposes */,
  "reviews_isnull" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if reviews are null */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the app developer */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the app publisher */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the app was released */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the app */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system supported by the app */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_content_rating FOREIGN KEY ("content_rating") REFERENCES app_content_ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the app category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the app */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the app */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was updated */,
  "android_version" TEXT /* Minimum Android version for the app version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  "version_size" TEXT /* Size of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the app */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given in the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_reviews_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the app */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_performance_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the app */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the app */,
  "pricing_date" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_pricing_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_content_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the content rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the app category */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was recorded */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_market_trends_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended app */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_recommendations_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_investor_insights" (
  "insight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor insight */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the app */,
  "insight_text" TEXT /* Text content of the insight */,
  "insight_date" TEXT /* Date when the insight was posted */,
  "insight_type" TEXT /* Type of insight (e.g., market trend, user behavior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_investor_insights_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_developer_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL where the tool can be accessed */,
  "tool_type" TEXT /* Type of tool (e.g., analytics, design) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)
